text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Trainer. This year, we're finally
in the Classics...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But what's with this room?! It's the holiday season,
yet it looks so bleak in here.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's precisely the point, you dummy!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Good grief! Just wait here a moment!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: King, are these window decorations okay?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, they're perfect! You all sure do know how to
please! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Give them more praise! ♪ They are my companions, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It looks like the New Year's meal I ordered
has arrived! All right, everyone, wait right here!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh! No, we should be thanking you! We're just
happy we're able to spend New Year's again with
King this year.
choice_data_list: Are you always together for New Year's?
Are you always together for New Year's?

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah, we don't go home for the holidays.

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I don't get along with my parents so well. When I
first came here, I just holed up in my room during
the holidays.

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: But then I met King...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! A little bird told me that there's a pair
of younger students having the most dreadfully
boring New Year's gathering!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Who are you?! And what are you doing barging
into our room?! You older students think you just
run everything, don't you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"Older student" barely befits me. You will refer to
me as King Halo, the first-rate Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now be grateful! I'm going to show you the
first-rate way to spend New Year's!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come! I'm granting you the right to make mochi
with me!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Uh... isn't that... a normal rice cooker?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. All mochi is is just balled up rice, is it not?
Go on, take a handful and press it together.

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text: But... this is just how you make rice balls...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pardon?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hey! What are the two of you doing taking up the
whole kotatsu?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Move over! Make room for me, otherwise forfeit
your oranges!

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hey! Don't be a meanie!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! I'm not being mean—I'm being King!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It's always fun spending time with King. She's so
cheerful and full of confidence.

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
That's why we decided to repay King for all she's
done for us by helping her out this year.

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
This is the most important year for King. It will be
the year she makes her dreams come true.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, the New Year's food has arrived! It's
time to eat and plan for the coming year!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What's this? You can look at me like that all you
want. I'm still charging you for your portion of the
food.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the four of us enjoy our New Year's meal
together.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... That was delicious. You ought to be
praising me for having made a reservation six
months in advance.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But that aside, let's turn to the future.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It may be a new year, by my plan remains
unchanged. We proceed to the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Then, we force a certain someone to recognize me. You understand what I'm saying, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, very well. Let's start taking action today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As a first-rate trainer, how do you plan to train
this first-rate Umamusume?
choice_data_list:
I'll keep you on a healthy diet during the
holiday break.
I'll make sure you're getting sufficient rest.
I'm going to make everyone love and adore you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're one to talk!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You've eaten just as much as I have.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come on, show me that belly of yours! I look
perfect by comparison!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! King! You actually pulled up your trainer's
shirt!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Well, I'm not the one who brought up
weight management! Trainer, expect me to
readjust your lifestyle habits from here on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since then, King Halo has become the one
training me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that's a surprisingly reasonable thing to
say.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, it would be awful for me to get sick before an important race. I have to be in perfect condition at all times.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Especially in winter. I can't afford to catch a cold.
Hmm...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I've been taking in enough vitamin C. I
should probably eat some oranges.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We go on to have oranges for dessert and enjoy a
leisurely New Year's holiday.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What?! That's not a goal at all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm already loved and adored by everyone, and
excessively so! What are you even talking about?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What's with that face? Do you mean to insinuate
something?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Explain yourself, Trainer. And make it short.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She continues to pester me on the subject for
some time.
